title: Simplicity
description: Makes Minecraft have less than Four Colours
body:
_woah! thank you guys so much for 500+ downloads! :D_

## 💚 **Welcome**

Ever thought that Minecraft was a bit too complicated? Maybe the Textures had too many Colors? Or just too much going on while You try to focus?

Meet **SIMPLICITY**!

The aim of this Resource Pack is to make Minecraft be as Simple as it can be! Go on! Simplify Your World!

## ⚡️ **Compatibility**

Simplicity makes Your World Simple. But what's simpler than installing Mods with a designed-for-it Client??... What? Breathing?... Uhh... Compatibility Packs!

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) [[Built-In](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simplicity_lavie)]
- _Coming Soon..._

## 🧩 **Tutorial**

Press The **Windows Key + R** keys, Type in **"%appdata%"**, Go to the **.minecraft** folder, Go into the **resourcepacks** folder, Drag in the **.zip** file into the **resourcepacks** folder, and You are good to go!
